records.m_Talk_ENG:
Where am I
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Where am I
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Where am I
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Lake must be one... Become one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Lake must be one... Become one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Lake must be one... Become one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: One with us... One with us...
records.m_Talk_DEU: One with us... One with us...
records.m_Talk_FRA: One with us... One with us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... I failed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... I failed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... I failed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To keep a promise, to save someone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To keep a promise, to save someone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To keep a promise, to save someone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't achieve anything... with my own hands...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't achieve anything... with my own hands...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't achieve anything... with my own hands...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Become one... Become one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Become one... Become one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Become one... Become one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roy Burnett... Roy Burnett...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roy Burnett... Roy Burnett...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roy Burnett... Roy Burnett...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I want to live! I want to live!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I want to live! I want to live!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I want to live! I want to live!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bollocks! I don't want to die miserably in a place like this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bollocks! I don't want to die miserably in a place like this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bollocks! I don't want to die miserably in a place like this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is anyone there?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is anyone there?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is anyone there?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Save me! Save me! Please...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Save me! Save me! Please...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Save me! Save me! Please...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...!! Get me out of here...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...!! Get me out of here...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...!! Get me out of here...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tea Bomb! Butler! Can anybody hear me?! Anyone will do! Anyone, please...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tea Bomb! Butler! Can anybody hear me?! Anyone will do! Anyone, please...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tea Bomb! Butler! Can anybody hear me?! Anyone will do! Anyone, please...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine, I lost!! I lost, okay!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine, I lost!! I lost, okay!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine, I lost!! I lost, okay!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do whatever you tell me to, so, please...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do whatever you tell me to, so, please...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do whatever you tell me to, so, please...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Become one with us, Roy Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Become one with us, Roy Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Become one with us, Roy Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's waiting for you. They want to devour you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's waiting for you. They want to devour you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's waiting for you. They want to devour you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Become one with us... our nemesis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Become one with us... our nemesis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Become one with us... our nemesis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh.*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh.*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh.*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever. I'm tired now. Do whatever you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever. I'm tired now. Do whatever you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever. I'm tired now. Do whatever you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've done enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've done enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've done enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You kept bluffing all tough until the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You kept bluffing all tough until the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You kept bluffing all tough until the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now you're begging for your life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now you're begging for your life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now you're begging for your life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. I'm going to get scolded when I face your grandfather in the afterlife.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. I'm going to get scolded when I face your grandfather in the afterlife.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. I'm going to get scolded when I face your grandfather in the afterlife.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But your bluffing was solid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But your bluffing was solid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But your bluffing was solid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was so righteous that everyone made excuses to ignore it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was so righteous that everyone made excuses to ignore it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was so righteous that everyone made excuses to ignore it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you tried to keep up that bluff from start to finish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you tried to keep up that bluff from start to finish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you tried to keep up that bluff from start to finish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that willpower is a given for a disciple of mine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that willpower is a given for a disciple of mine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that willpower is a given for a disciple of mine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. How upsetting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. How upsetting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. How upsetting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've known each other for so long. Have you forgotten about me already?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've known each other for so long. Have you forgotten about me already?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've known each other for so long. Have you forgotten about me already?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgan. Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgan. Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgan. Thaddeus Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a problem solver, especially good at picking up the slack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a problem solver, especially good at picking up the slack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a problem solver, especially good at picking up the slack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old chap... Morgan...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old chap... Morgan...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old chap... Morgan...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who was shouting for someone to save you, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one who was shouting for someone to save you, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one who was shouting for someone to save you, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't sleep with all that noise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't sleep with all that noise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't sleep with all that noise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh... I'm surprised you managed to retain your own will for this long within us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ho-oh... I'm surprised you managed to retain your own will for this long within us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh... I'm surprised you managed to retain your own will for this long within us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What an admirable level of tenacity, Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What an admirable level of tenacity, Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What an admirable level of tenacity, Thaddeus Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But would you become one with us now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But would you become one with us now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But would you become one with us now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, what an impatient little lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, what an impatient little lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, what an impatient little lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgan...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgan...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgan...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, don't worry. This is nothing compared to the mess I've been through in my youth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, don't worry. This is nothing compared to the mess I've been through in my youth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, don't worry. This is nothing compared to the mess I've been through in my youth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It might be too late for me, but it's a piece of cake to get one kid out of here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It might be too late for me, but it's a piece of cake to get one kid out of here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It might be too late for me, but it's a piece of cake to get one kid out of here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you trying to do...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trying to do...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to do...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit it, Morgan...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit it, Morgan...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit it, Morgan...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All legends start with someone's bluff, like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All legends start with someone's bluff, like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All legends start with someone's bluff, like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you can keep up with the bluff and ultimately make it a reality,
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you can keep up with the bluff and ultimately make it a reality,
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you can keep up with the bluff and ultimately make it a reality,

records.m_Talk_ENG: the legend gains power, and it is forever engraved in the memories of the people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the legend gains power, and it is forever engraved in the memories of the people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the legend gains power, and it is forever engraved in the memories of the people.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Morgan, your body is
8g!!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Morgan, your body is
8g!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Morgan, your body is
8g!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, a Burnett should never break.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, a Burnett should never break.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, a Burnett should never break.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until the ones who chase after that legend bluff, and the bluff becomes a new legend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until the ones who chase after that legend bluff, and the bluff becomes a new legend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until the ones who chase after that legend bluff, and the bluff becomes a new legend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgan, no...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgan, no...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgan, no...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, don't do this...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, don't do this...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, don't do this...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now... it's your turn to carry on the legend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now... it's your turn to carry on the legend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now... it's your turn to carry on the legend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roy Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roy Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roy Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! Don't! Morgan...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! Don't! Morgan...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! Don't! Morgan...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aah, AHHHHHHHHHH...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aah, AHHHHHHHHHH...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aah, AHHHHHHHHHH...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like this is it for me, Sir Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like this is it for me, Sir Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like this is it for me, Sir Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's a relief, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's a relief, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's a relief, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I managed to pass on every last skill I learned from you to the kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I managed to pass on every last skill I learned from you to the kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I managed to pass on every last skill I learned from you to the kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, his bluffing was even better than mine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, his bluffing was even better than mine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, his bluffing was even better than mine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're watching, I think you can look forward to his future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're watching, I think you can look forward to his future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're watching, I think you can look forward to his future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't surpass you until the end, but.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't surpass you until the end, but.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't surpass you until the end, but.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He might be able to reach your level.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He might be able to reach your level.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He might be able to reach your level.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or perhaps, even beyond that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or perhaps, even beyond that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or perhaps, even beyond that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't too fond of the nickname <color=#ffd34c>"a man who stood on the verge of greatness"</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't too fond of the nickname <color=#ffd34c>"a man who stood on the verge of greatness"</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't too fond of the nickname <color=#ffd34c>"a man who stood on the verge of greatness"</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at last, I understand its true meaning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at last, I understand its true meaning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at last, I understand its true meaning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My role was to stand on the verge of greatness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My role was to stand on the verge of greatness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My role was to stand on the verge of greatness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To greet the upcoming legend and show him the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To greet the upcoming legend and show him the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To greet the upcoming legend and show him the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. It feels a bit harsh, thinking of it like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. It feels a bit harsh, thinking of it like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. It feels a bit harsh, thinking of it like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I've definitely played
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I've definitely played
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I've definitely played

records.m_Talk_ENG: the role I was given.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the role I was given.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the role I was given.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, don't worry. This is nothing compared to the mess I've been through in my youth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It might be too late for me, but it's a piece of cake to get one kid out of here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It might be too late for me, but it's a piece of cake to get one kid out of here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It might be too late for me, but it's a piece of cake to get one kid out of here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you trying to do...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trying to do...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to do...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Quit it, Morgan...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Quit it, Morgan...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Quit it, Morgan...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All legends start with someone's bluff, like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All legends start with someone's bluff, like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All legends start with someone's bluff, like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if you can keep up with the bluff and ultimately make it a reality,
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if you can keep up with the bluff and ultimately make it a reality,
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you can keep up with the bluff and ultimately make it a reality,

root.m_Talk_ENG: the legend gains power, and it is forever engraved in the memories of the people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: the legend gains power, and it is forever engraved in the memories of the people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: the legend gains power, and it is forever engraved in the memories of the people.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Morgan, your body is
8g!!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Morgan, your body is
8g!!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Morgan, your body is
8g!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, a Burnett should never break.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, a Burnett should never break.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, a Burnett should never break.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until the ones who chase after that legend bluff, and the bluff becomes a new legend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Until the ones who chase after that legend bluff, and the bluff becomes a new legend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Until the ones who chase after that legend bluff, and the bluff becomes a new legend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgan, no...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgan, no...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgan, no...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, don't do this...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, don't do this...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, don't do this...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And now... it's your turn to carry on the legend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And now... it's your turn to carry on the legend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And now... it's your turn to carry on the legend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Roy Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Roy Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Roy Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No! Don't! Morgan...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No! Don't! Morgan...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No! Don't! Morgan...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aah, AHHHHHHHHHH...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aah, AHHHHHHHHHH...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aah, AHHHHHHHHHH...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like this is it for me, Sir Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like this is it for me, Sir Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like this is it for me, Sir Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's a relief, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's a relief, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's a relief, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I managed to pass on every last skill I learned from you to the kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I managed to pass on every last skill I learned from you to the kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I managed to pass on every last skill I learned from you to the kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, his bluffing was even better than mine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, his bluffing was even better than mine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, his bluffing was even better than mine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're watching, I think you can look forward to his future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're watching, I think you can look forward to his future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're watching, I think you can look forward to his future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't surpass you until the end, but.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't surpass you until the end, but.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't surpass you until the end, but.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He might be able to reach your level.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He might be able to reach your level.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He might be able to reach your level.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or perhaps, even beyond that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or perhaps, even beyond that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or perhaps, even beyond that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't too fond of the nickname <color=#ffd34c>"a man who stood on the verge of greatness"</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't too fond of the nickname <color=#ffd34c>"a man who stood on the verge of greatness"</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't too fond of the nickname <color=#ffd34c>"a man who stood on the verge of greatness"</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But at last, I understand its true meaning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But at last, I understand its true meaning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But at last, I understand its true meaning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My role was to stand on the verge of greatness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My role was to stand on the verge of greatness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My role was to stand on the verge of greatness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To greet the upcoming legend and show him the way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To greet the upcoming legend and show him the way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To greet the upcoming legend and show him the way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. It feels a bit harsh, thinking of it like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. It feels a bit harsh, thinking of it like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. It feels a bit harsh, thinking of it like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I've definitely played
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I've definitely played
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I've definitely played

root.m_Talk_ENG: the role I was given.
root.m_Talk_DEU: the role I was given.
root.m_Talk_FRA: the role I was given.
